meta.title: Controlá - Your hotel on autopilot
meta.description: Controlá digitizes your hotel's infrastructure. We leverage what you already have and fill in the gaps. HVAC, operations, incident prevention, and access control on autopilot.
meta.ogDescription: We automate your hotel operations by leveraging the infrastructure you already have.

hero.subtitle: Less wasted energy. Fewer guest complaints. More time for what matters.

problems.title: What happens when you don't know what's going on in your rooms
problems.subtitle: Most hotels find out about problems when it's already too late.
problems.card1Text: Empty rooms with air conditioning or heating running for hours. Money going straight out the window.
problems.card2Text: The cleaning team doesn't know when the guest left. They knock, wait, waste time. Or worse: the room goes uncleaned.
problems.card3Text: Water leaks, broken water heaters, faulty AC units. You find out when the guest complains, not when the problem starts.

solutions.label: Solutions
solutions.title: Everything you need, in one place
solutions.subtitle: Each solution integrates with the systems you already have. No starting from scratch.

clima.title: HVAC management
clima.description: Climate control adapts automatically to the real occupancy of each room. No manual intervention needed.

ops.title: Room operations
ops.description: The hotel knows in real time what's happening in each room and acts automatically.

prevention.title: Incident prevention
prevention.description: Detect problems before they escalate. Fewer guest complaints, fewer costly repairs.

access.title: Access control
access.description: Dynamic access codes generated automatically for each guest. No physical keys.

how.label: How it works
how.title: From your current hotel to autopilot in 3 steps
how.step1Text: We review what technology your hotel has: thermostats, centralized HVAC, cameras, locks. We identify what can be leveraged and what needs to be added.
how.step2Text: We integrate everything with your PMS and our platform. We set up automations tailored to your hotel's actual operations.
how.step3Text: Rooms are managed automatically. Climate control regulates itself, housekeeping gets the alerts, and you see everything from a single dashboard.

ctaBanner.title: Less waste. Fewer surprises. Less manual work.
ctaBanner.subtitle: Every hotel is different. That's why we adapt to what you already have and build from there.

faq.label: Frequently asked questions
faq.title: What everyone asks us
faq.q1: Do I need to buy new devices?
faq.a1: It depends on what you already have. If your hotel has smart thermostats, centralized HVAC systems, or connected locks, we leverage them. If something is missing, we recommend what to buy or provide it directly. The goal is to minimize initial investment.
faq.a2: It depends on the hotel size and existing infrastructure. For hotels that already have smart devices, connection can happen in days. If new hardware needs to be installed, the process can take 1 to 3 weeks.
faq.a3: We work with the most widely used PMS in the hotel industry. If you use a specific PMS, contact us and we'll confirm compatibility. PMS integration is what allows automations to respond to check-ins, checkouts, and reservation changes in real time.
faq.a4: In most cases, no. The devices we use are wireless and install without modifying existing infrastructure. If the hotel already has centralized systems, integration is done via software.
faq.a5: The model is a monthly subscription per device or room. No large upfront investments. The exact price depends on which solutions you need and your existing infrastructure. We'll detail it in the 30-minute call.
faq.a6: We continuously monitor all connected devices. If a sensor stops working or loses connection, we detect it automatically and notify you. Additionally, automations are designed with fallbacks so the hotel keeps operating normally.

meta.title: Smart Checkout Button | Controlá
meta.description: IoT button that automatically notifies your team when a guest checks out. +85% adoption rate. Installation in 15 minutes.

hero.title: Checkout with a single tap.
hero.subtitle: Your guests press a button when they leave. Your team gets notified instantly. No apps, no waiting, no hassle.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Have the guests left yet?
problem.text1: Hosts and cleaning staff have no real-time information about when rooms are vacated.
problem.text2: Thousands of unnecessary messages between operations and cleaning teams due to lack of information about guest departures.
problem.text3: Rooms that could be ready hours earlier sit idle because no one confirmed the guest has left.

solution.label: The solution
solution.title: One button. One notification. Zero friction.
solution.text: A smart internet-connected button that guests press when checking out to notify they are leaving the property.
solution.text2: When the button is pressed, the cleaning and operations team receives an immediate notification to start cleaning without delays.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Extremely simple
howItWorks.step1Text: They press the button when checking out. The system sends a notification that the room is vacant.
howItWorks.step2Text: The cleaning staff receives the alert and goes directly to the room. No waiting, no knocking on doors.
howItWorks.step3Text: When finished, the staff presses the button. Operations knows the room is ready for the next guest.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.title: Alerts where you need them
notifications.text: Notifications to any person or team you want, through the channel you prefer.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.title: Everything in real time
dashboard.text: Panel designed for operations managers showing in real time:
dashboard.f1: Which rooms have checked out (and at what time)
dashboard.f4: Which are ready for the next guest

installation.label: Installation
installation.title: Up and running in 15 minutes
installation.step1: Stick the checkout button on the door
installation.step2: Connect our hub to your router
installation.note: The package includes everything needed for installation. You don't even need a screwdriver. Anyone can install it.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.a1: Less than 10 minutes! Just stick the sign with the button on the door and connect the hub to the router.
faq.a2: No. The package includes absolutely everything needed for installation. You don't even need a screwdriver.
faq.a3: If you can stick a sign on a door and plug a charger into an outlet, you can install the button.
faq.a4: The devices run on batteries and send data wirelessly to the hub connected to the router.
faq.q5: How long do the batteries last?
faq.a5: Device batteries last between 12 and 24 months.
faq.a6: Yes! If you have more than 50 apartments, we have exclusive discounts for you.
faq.q7: What happens if they press the button on a non-checkout day?
faq.a7: We connect with your booking calendar so the button only works on checkout days. If pressed any other day, no message is sent.

cityEnergy.metaDescription: Find out how much your hotel in {city} can save with smart HVAC automation. Up to {savings} in energy savings.
cityEnergy.heroTitle: How much is your hotel in {city} losing to inefficient HVAC?
cityEnergy.heroSubtitle: Hotels in {city} waste up to {waste} per year on HVAC in empty rooms. Smart automation can cut that cost by {savings}.
cityEnergy.contextTitle: Why is energy efficiency critical in {city}?
cityEnergy.problemTitle: A 50-room hotel in {city} can waste {waste} per year on HVAC
cityEnergy.problem1Text: Air conditioning or heating keeps running hours after the guest has left. It's the biggest invisible expense.
cityEnergy.problem2Text: Without sensors, the hotel has no idea which rooms are empty. HVAC runs the same at 20% or 90% occupancy.
cityEnergy.problem3Text: Thermostats guests set to 16°C with no way to limit them. Windows wide open while AC blasts at full power.
cityEnergy.solutionTitle: Smart HVAC automation for hotels in {city}
cityEnergy.solutionSubtitle: Controlá connects occupancy sensors with your existing HVAC system. When the room is empty, the system acts on its own.
cityEnergy.feat1Text: HVAC turns off when the room is empty and reactivates before the guest arrives.
cityEnergy.feat2Text: Set a temperature range guests cannot override. No wasted energy.
cityEnergy.feat3Text: When a room has been empty for more than X minutes, the system switches to eco mode automatically.
cityEnergy.feat4Text: If the guest opens a window, the AC shuts off. No wasted energy.
cityEnergy.feat5Text: Compatible with split, VRF, fan-coil, and existing thermostats. No need to replace anything.
cityEnergy.feat6Text: See consumption per room, temperatures, and cumulative savings from a single panel.
cityEnergy.savingsTitle: Estimated savings for a hotel in {city}
cityEnergy.savingsDisclaimer: Estimates based on Controlá's own data for 50-room hotels under similar conditions.
cityEnergy.howTitle: From your current hotel to autopilot in 3 steps
cityEnergy.howStep1Text: We review the technology in your hotel in {city}: thermostats, central HVAC, sensors. We identify what can be leveraged.
cityEnergy.howStep2Text: We integrate everything with your PMS and our platform. We set up automations tailored to your operations.
cityEnergy.howStep3Text: HVAC adjusts automatically based on real occupancy. You see everything from a single dashboard.
cityEnergy.faqTitle: Questions about hotel energy efficiency in {city}
cityEnergy.faq1Q: How much can a hotel in {city} save with Controlá?
cityEnergy.faq1A: Depending on size and existing infrastructure, hotels in {city} can reduce HVAC consumption by {savings}. For a 50-room hotel, that can mean saving {waste} per year.
cityEnergy.faq2Q: Do I need to replace my HVAC system?
cityEnergy.faq2A: No. Controlá works with the most common systems: split, VRF, fan-coil, and existing thermostats. We leverage what you already have.
cityEnergy.faq3A: Between 1 and 3 weeks, depending on hotel size and existing infrastructure. Hotels that already have smart devices can be set up in days.
cityEnergy.faq4A: The model is a monthly subscription per room. No large upfront investment. We'll walk you through it in the 30-minute call.
cityEnergy.ctaSubtitle: We'll show you how much you can save on HVAC in 30 minutes. No strings attached.
